phoneticUs: 藢semis瑟n藞胃et瑟k; 藢sema瑟s瑟n藞胃et瑟k
examples: Many natural and semisynthetic variants have since been produced.
Amoxi-Tabs is a semisynthetic antibiotic with a broad spectrum of activity.
They successfully designed a semisynthetic version by 1995, gleaning insights into the molecule that would be invaluable in building better ones later.
